raw_triage.issue_text: aToken.transfer_internal calls router.validate_and_finalize_transfer, but that router hook validates caller/HF/collateral bitmaps and does not enforce global pool pause or reserve paused/active flags. Direct aToken transfers may continue moving collateral shares during emergency pause/reserve pause/inactive state.
raw_triage.likely_root_cause: StaticATokenLM transfer reward update gap can cause rewards to be lost or assigned to the wrong holder during token transfers

minimum_assertions: 当前代码路径可由有效攻击者或普通用户触发

影响不是仅由 trusted-role misconfiguration、用户误操作或 unsupported token 触发
若作为 HM，PoC 或状态推演能支撑 C4 severity
